title: What does Modern Maison offer?
answer: Modern Maison Co offers catering, charcuterie classes, kids’ cooking sessions, and boards and grazing options.

title: Current classes and workshops
answer: We offer a variety of classes and workshops on a quarterly basis. Current offerings vary and can be found on our Current Classes page. Our class categories include Charcuterie Workshops, Kids’ Cooking Classes, and Senior Classes. For specific class information or to host your own curated class, please visit our charcuterie classes page.

title: Private classes
answer: Yes. We offer private workshops and cooking classes for birthday parties, corporate events, family gatherings, and other special occasions.

title: Catering services
answer: We specialize in catering for all occasions, including intimate gatherings, weddings, corporate events, and celebrations of all sizes. Our menus are tailored to reflect your vision, offering a mix of elegance, flavor, and creativity. Please visit our catering page for a full overview of our catering options.

title: What is included in the charcuterie workshops?
answer: Our charcuterie workshops include all tools and ingredients needed to create a stunning board, instruction on pairing flavors, arranging designs, and creating an aesthetic spread, and a completed board to take home and enjoy. For more information on hosting your own group workshop, please visit the charcuterie classes page.

title: Are the kids’ cooking classes age-specific?
answer: Yes. Our kids’ classes are tailored to specific age groups to ensure the experience is fun, engaging, and age-appropriate. Let us know your child’s age when booking.

title: How do I stay updated on new classes and services?
answer: Follow us on Instagram or subscribe to our newsletter for the latest updates, new class announcements, and exclusive offers.

title: Charcuterie boxes basics
answer: Charcuterie boxes start at $90, serve 3 to 4 people, and are custom made. Selections vary. Dietary options listed include traditional, vegan, vegetarian, gluten free, pork free, and pescatarian. Orders must be placed 72 hours in advance, and delivery is not included in the listed price.

title: Contact email
answer: You can contact Modern Maison at char@modernmaisonco.com.
